case_title: SIU WARREN et al VS REALTY DIAMOND CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $750.00 FILED BY SIU WARREN SIU AUXIL DORA AS TO DEFENDANT REALTY DIAMOND CORPORATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-22-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
